title: 挑战 Google 的 Gemini？
description: 迫于Gemini的竞争压力，OpenAI计划将其AI视频生成工具Sora整合到ChatGPT中，旨在集中资源实现每周活跃用户10亿的目标。
titleZh: 挑战 Google 的 Gemini？
titleEn: Taking on Google's Gemini? OpenAI Plans to Integrate Video Generation into ChatGPT
descriptionZh: 迫于Gemini的竞争压力，OpenAI计划将其AI视频生成工具Sora整合到ChatGPT中，旨在集中资源实现每周活跃用户10亿的目标。
descriptionEn: Under competitive pressure from Gemini, OpenAI plans to integrate its AI video generation tool Sora into ChatGPT, aiming to concentrate resources to hit the target of 1 billion weekly active users. Meanwhile, as Sora's popularity as a standalone app has been declining, this move is also expected to leverage ChatGPT's massive user base to boost the competitiveness of AI video generation.
